title: Add hunting & fishing highlight to homepage

requirements.text: Update the HomePage (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) to prominently highlight that Jackman, Maine is renowned for hunting and fishing. Add a dedicated callout section or prominent badge/banner in the hero area or quick-highlights zone that reads something like 'World-Class Hunting & Fishing Destination' with a short supporting line (e.g., 'Jackman is celebrated for trophy deer, moose, and bear hunting and some of Maine's finest fishing on the Moose River and area lakes'). The treatment should be visually prominent, consistent with the existing Northern Maine wilderness theme (deep forest greens, amber accents), and link to the Recreation & Outdoors page.

quotes: Put on the main page of the website that is known for hunting and fishing.

acceptanceCriteria: The homepage displays a clearly visible section or callout stating Jackman is known for hunting and fishing.
The callout includes a brief descriptive line referencing hunting and fishing opportunities in the area.
The element links to the Recreation & Outdoors page.
Styling is consistent with the existing Northern Maine wilderness theme (forest greens, amber/wood-tone accents).
The addition does not break existing homepage layout or navigation.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/.
Do not alter the backend schema or add new backend endpoints.
nonGoals: Adding new backend data for hunting/fishing content.
Changing the Recreation & Outdoors page content (already updated in a prior version).
